<title>Haadi — larp maestro, potential man, vibe coder</title>
<style>
  :root {
    --paper: #f1f2f5;
    --ink: #17181c;
    --mist: #6b7280;
    --line: #d8dae0;
    --card: #e6e8ec;
    --slate: #0e0e10;
    --slate-ink: #e8e9ec;
    --slate-mist: #8b8d93;
    --blue: #3b82f6;
    --magenta: #d946ef;
    --green: #16a34a;
    --orange: #ea580c;
    --focus: #3b82f6;
  }

  @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
    :root {
      --paper: #0c0d10;
      --ink: #eef0f3;
      --mist: #94969c;
      --line: #2a2c33;
      --card: #131418;
      --slate: #000000;
      --slate-ink: #e8e9ec;
      --slate-mist: #85878e;
      --green: #22c55e;
      --orange: #f97316;
    }
  }

  :root[data-theme="dark"] {
    --paper: #0c0d10;
    --ink: #eef0f3;
    --mist: #94969c;
    --line: #2a2c33;
    --card: #131418;
    --slate: #000000;
    --slate-ink: #e8e9ec;
    --slate-mist: #85878e;
    --green: #22c55e;
    --orange: #f97316;
  }

  :root[data-theme="light"] {
    --paper: #f1f2f5;
    --ink: #17181c;
    --mist: #6b7280;
    --line: #d8dae0;
    --card: #e6e8ec;
    --slate: #0e0e10;
    --slate-ink: #e8e9ec;
    --slate-mist: #8b8d93;
    --green: #16a34a;
    --orange: #ea580c;
  }

  * { box-sizing: border-box; }

  body {
    margin: 0;
    background: var(--paper);
    color: var(--ink);
    font-family: ui-monospace, "Cascadia Code", "JetBrains Mono", "Fira Code",
      "SFMono-Regular", Consolas, "Liberation Mono", Menlo, monospace;
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.65;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  }

  a { color: inherit; }

  .wrap {
    max-width: 700px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 90px 24px 64px;
    position: relative;
  }

  /* theme toggle */
  .toggle {
    position: fixed;
    top: 22px;
    right: 24px;
    width: 34px;
    height: 34px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--ink);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .toggle:hover { border-color: var(--line); }
  .toggle:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--focus); outline-offset: 2px; }
  .toggle svg { width: 17px; height: 17px; }
  .toggle .sun { display: none; }
  :root[data-theme="dark"] .toggle .moon { display: none; }
  :root[data-theme="dark"] .toggle .sun { display: block; }

  /* header */
  h1.name {
    margin: 0 0 6px;
    font-size: 27px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  }
  .tagline {
    margin: 0 0 22px;
    color: var(--mist);
  }
  .intro {
    margin: 0 0 44px;
    max-width: 62ch;
  }

  /* section headers */
  .section-head {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    margin: 0 0 18px;
  }
  .section-head .bar {
    width: 3px;
    align-self: stretch;
    border-radius: 2px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .section-head h2 {
    margin: 0;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .section-head .rule {
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--line);
    width: 100%;
  }
  section { margin-bottom: 48px; }

  /* what i do */
  .do-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 22px 32px;
  }
  .do-item { display: flex; gap: 10px; }
  .do-item .dot {
    width: 7px;
    height: 7px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    margin-top: 7px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .do-item h3 {
    margin: 0 0 3px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
  }
  .do-item p {
    margin: 0;
    color: var(--mist);
    font-size: 13px;
  }

  /* stack grid */
  .stack-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 26px 12px;
  }
  .stack-item {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 9px;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .badge {
    width: 40px;
    height: 40px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .badge.outline { color: var(--ink); }
  .badge svg { width: 26px; height: 26px; fill: currentColor; }
  .stack-item span { font-size: 12px; color: var(--mist); }

  /* projects */
  .project-dark {
    background: var(--card);
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 18px;
    margin-bottom: 18px;
  }
  .mockup {
    background: var(--slate);
    color: var(--slate-ink);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 18px 20px 46px;
    position: relative;
    min-height: 190px;
    font-size: 12px;
  }
  .mockup-top {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }
  .mockup-top strong { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; }
  .signout {
    background: #7f1d1d;
    color: #fecaca;
    border-radius: 6px;
    padding: 3px 8px;
    font-size: 11px;
  }
  .search {
    border: 1px solid #2c2d31;
    border-radius: 6px;
    padding: 7px 10px;
    color: var(--slate-mist);
    font-size: 11px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
  }
  .task-row {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 8px 0;
    border-top: 1px solid #1e1f23;
    font-size: 12px;
  }
  .task-row:first-of-type { border-top: none; }
  .task-actions { display: flex; gap: 6px; }
  .icon-btn {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    background: #f4f4f5;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .icon-btn svg { width: 11px; height: 11px; }
  .new-task {
    position: absolute;
    right: 16px;
    bottom: 14px;
    background: #f4f4f5;
    color: #111;
    border-radius: 6px;
    padding: 5px 10px;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
  }

  .project-meta {
    display: flex;
    align-items: baseline;
    justify-content: space-between;
    margin-top: 16px;
  }
  .project-meta h3 { margin: 0; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; }
  .project-links { display: flex; gap: 10px; color: var(--mist); }
  .project-links svg { width: 15px; height: 15px; }
  .project-desc { margin: 8px 0 12px; color: var(--mist); font-size: 13px; }
  .chip-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .chip {
    width: 26px;
    height: 26px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 9px;
    font-weight: 700;
  }
  .chip svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; fill: currentColor; }

  .project-light {
    background: var(--card);
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 18px;
  }
  .cmd {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    background: var(--slate);
    color: var(--slate-ink);
    border-radius: 6px;
    padding: 8px 12px;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .cmd .prompt { color: var(--slate-mist); }
  .pkg-meta {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
  }
  .pkg-meta h3 { margin: 0; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; }
  .version {
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--mist);
    border: 1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius: 5px;
    padding: 2px 7px;
  }
  .project-light .project-desc { margin: 8px 0 14px; }
  .pkg-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
  .npm-badge {
    width: 18px;
    height: 18px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .npm-badge svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; fill: #cb3837; }
  .pkg-links svg { width: 15px; height: 15px; color: var(--mist); }
  .pkg-links .spacer { flex: 1; }

  .more {
    margin: 0 0 30px;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--mist);
  }
  .more a { text-decoration: underline; color: var(--ink); }
  .blog-link {
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 56px;
    font-size: 13px;
    text-decoration: underline;
  }

  footer {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 20px;
    color: var(--mist);
  }
  footer svg { width: 17px; height: 17px; }
  footer a:hover { color: var(--ink); }

  .to-top {
    position: fixed;
    right: 24px;
    bottom: 24px;
    width: 40px;
    height: 40px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--card);
    color: var(--ink);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    cursor: pointer;
    border: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .to-top svg { width: 15px; height: 15px; }
  .to-top:focus-visible, a:focus-visible, button:focus-visible {
    outline: 2px solid var(--focus);
    outline-offset: 2px;
  }

  @media (max-width: 560px) {
    .do-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .stack-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }
  }
</style>

<button class="toggle" id="themeToggle" aria-label="Toggle color theme">
  <svg class="moon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M21 12.8A9 9 0 1 1 11.2 3 7 7 0 0 0 21 12.8Z"/></svg>
  <svg class="sun" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4"/><path d="M12 2v2M12 20v2M4.9 4.9l1.4 1.4M17.7 17.7l1.4 1.4M2 12h2M20 12h2M4.9 19.1l1.4-1.4M17.7 6.3l1.4-1.4"/></svg>
</button>

<div class="wrap">

  <h1 class="name">Mawuli</h1>
  <p class="tagline">larp maestro. potential man. vibe coder</p>
  <p class="intro">hey. i'm Mawuli. a Software developer who enjoys the art of software engineering. i'm open to collaborate on any projects you might have in mind. feel free to reach out.</p>

 <section>
  <div class="section-head">
    <div class="bar" style="background:var(--blue)"></div>
    <h2>what i do</h2>
    <div class="rule"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="do-grid">
    <div class="do-item">
      <span class="dot" style="background:var(--blue)"></span>
      <div>
        <h3>full-stack development</h3>
        <p>building scalable web and mobile applications with modern technologies.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="do-item">
      <span class="dot" style="background:var(--magenta)"></span>
      <div>
        <h3>AI-powered solutions</h3>
        <p>integrating LLMs, intelligent agents, and automation into real-world products.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="do-item">
      <span class="dot" style="background:var(--green)"></span>
      <div>
        <h3>cybersecurity engineering</h3>
        <p>applying secure coding practices, authentication, and vulnerability mitigation.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="do-item">
      <span class="dot" style="background:var(--orange)"></span>
      <div>
        <h3>software architecture</h3>
        <p>designing maintainable systems with clean code, scalable architectures, and best practices.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

  <section>
    <div class="section-head">
      <div class="bar" style="background:var(--blue)"></div>
      <h2>what i work with</h2>
      <div class="rule"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="stack-grid" id="stackGrid"></div>
  </section>

  

 

  <footer>
    <a href="#" aria-label="X"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M18.9 3H22l-7.6 8.7L23 21h-6.9l-5.4-6.5L4.5 21H1.4l8.1-9.3L1 3h7.1l4.9 5.9L18.9 3Zm-1.2 16h1.7L7.4 5H5.6l12.1 14Z"/></svg></a>
    <a href="#" aria-label="Instagram"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="5"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4"/><circle cx="17.5" cy="6.5" r="1"/></svg></a>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/frank-mawuli-8ab7b2287/" aria-label="LinkedIn"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M4.98 3.5a2.5 2.5 0 1 0 0 5 2.5 2.5 0 0 0 0-5ZM3 9h4v12H3zM10 9h3.8v1.7h.05c.53-1 1.83-2 3.76-2 4.02 0 4.76 2.6 4.76 6V21h-4v-5.4c0-1.3-.02-2.97-1.8-2.97-1.8 0-2.08 1.4-2.08 2.87V21h-4z"/></svg></a>
  </footer>
</div>

<button class="to-top" id="toTop" aria-label="Scroll to top">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M12 19V5M5 12l7-7 7 7"/></svg>
</button>

<script>
  var toggle = document.getElementById('themeToggle');
  var current = 'light';
  document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', current);
  toggle.addEventListener('click', function () {
    current = current === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark';
    document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', current);
  });

  document.getElementById('toTop').addEventListener('click', function () {
    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches ? 'auto' : 'smooth' });
  });

  };

  function iconSvg(slug) {
    return '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="' + ICONS[slug] + '"/></svg>';
  }

  var stack = [
    ['TypeScript', '#3178c6', 'typescript'],
    ['Python', '#3776ab', 'python'],
    ['React', '#149eca', 'react'],
    ['Next.js', 'ink', 'nextdotjs'],
    ['Expo', 'ink', 'expo'],
    ['Tailwind CSS', '#06b6d4', 'tailwindcss'],
    ['GSAP', '#88ce02', 'greensock'],
    ['TanStack Query', '#ef4444', 'tanstack'],
    ['PostgreSQL', '#336791', 'postgresql'],
    ['Neon', '#00e599', 'neon'],
    ['Clerk', 'ink', 'clerk'],
    ['Vite', '#646cff', 'vite'],
    ['Node.js', '#5fa04e', 'nodejs'],
    ['Docker', '#2496ed', 'docker'],
    ['Express.js', 'ink', 'express'],
    ['JWT', 'ink', 'jwt'],
    ['FastAPI', '#009688', 'fastapi'],
    ['Turborepo', 'ink', 'turborepo'],
    ['Zod', 'ink', 'zod'],
    ['Figma', '#a259ff', 'figma'],
  ];
  var grid = document.getElementById('stackGrid');
  stack.forEach(function (item) {
    var el = document.createElement('div');
    el.className = 'stack-item';
    var color = item[1] === 'ink' ? 'var(--ink)' : item[1];
    el.innerHTML = '<span class="badge" style="color:' + color + '">' + iconSvg(item[2]) + '</span><span>' + item[0] + '</span>';
    grid.appendChild(el);
  });

  var chipColors = ['#149eca', '#646cff', '#3178c6', '#06b6d4', '#ef4444', '#2596be', '#336791', '#00e599'];
  var chipSlugs = ['react', 'vite', 'typescript', 'tailwindcss', 'tanstack', 'trpc', 'postgresql', 'neon'];
  var chips = document.getElementById('taskthingChips');
  chipColors.forEach(function (c, i) {
    var el = document.createElement('span');
    el.className = 'chip';
    el.style.color = c;
    el.innerHTML = iconSvg(chipSlugs[i]);
    chips.appendChild(el);
  });

  document.getElementById('npmBadge').innerHTML = iconSvg('npm');
</script>
